page_metadata.biotools__summary: Optimized CRISPR guide RNA design for two high-fidelity Cas9 variants by deep learning | Core code for the DeepHF prediction tool | SpCas9 & Base Editor Efficiency Prediction | This tool provides guide designs for Wild-type SpCas9, two highly specific Cas9 mutants(eSpCas9 (1.1) and SpCas9-HF1) and base editors (AncBE4max, ABEmax)
